Machete.description: A heavy duty blade, highly durable but less suitable for skinning.

Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A simple tool for crafting resins, pastes, medicines and more.
Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle.flavorText: The tool of chefs, herbalists, apothecaries and alchemists.

Kit_Machining_Bench.description: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with basic machine tools.

Material_Processor.description: Swiftly craft advanced ingredients and resources.

Wood_Crate_Medium.description: Store, share and protect items and resources.

Wood_Hedgehog_Medium.description: A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure.
Wood_Hedgehog_Medium.flavorText: Hedgehogs may have been left on Earth but the lessons they tought will serve us well on Icarus.

Masonry_Bench.description: Tools for working and shaping stone.
Masonry_Bench.flavorText: The art of stonework is untouched by the distance between worlds.

Interior_Wood_Crate_Medium.description: A storage unit for items and gear.

Coconut_mature.description: Maturity diminishes liquid content, but offers more satisfying flesh.
Coconut_mature.flavorText: A coconut\'s final stage is also its most energy-rich.

Mammoth_Tusk.description: A fortune in ivory from a titan reborn; a small step towards revealing Icarus\'s secrets.
Mammoth_Tusk.flavorText: Theories suggest that when exotic material present in plant life is ingested, it affects cellular reproduction in animals. The exact mechanism is unclear, with speculation that some varieties of exotics possess negative mass, producing relativistic micro-effects. Analysis of this specimen will reveal more.

Meta_Ration.flavorText: For those with more pressing concerns than what their food actually tastes like, Agrizero\'s MREs provide enduring sustenance.

Meta_Module_Movement.flavorText: Experiments by Larkwell Martinez into the gravitational effects of exotics have resulted in a prototype known as the \'Dampener\', which slightly lowers local mass, allowing swifter movement.

Mushroom.description: A nutritious fungus, can be eaten raw, but best fried.
Mushroom.flavorText: The full implications of introducing fungi to a new world are yet to be seen.

Mushroom_Soup.description: A passable impression of a classic dish.
Mushroom_Soup.flavorText: While some critics regard this meal as pointless if made without butter, purists do not last long on Icarus.

Meat_Pie.description: A rustic pie that delivers a big health boost.
Meat_Pie.flavorText: "Stress cannot exist in the presence of a pie." - David Mamet

Advanced_Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Advanced_Kitchen_Storage.description: The best cabinets this planet can offer.

Advanced_Kitchen_Bench.flavorText: Cleaner and more durable than other benches on Icarus.

Meta_Axe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides 90% of printing designs to the ever-expanding AM market.

Meta_Pickaxe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides a vast range of AM designs for a small licensing fee.

Meta_Knife_Printed.description: A 3D printed metal hunting knife of no great quality.
Meta_Knife_Printed.flavorText: A staple of metallic AM printing, which has probably made its designer a small fortune in licensing fees.

Meta_Spear_Printed.description: A low quality, but perfectly serviceable 3D printed spear.
Meta_Spear_Printed.flavorText: Using techniques pioneered in the early 21st century, additive manufacturing has rendered metal the new plastic.

Meta_Sickle_Printed.description: A metallic polymer blade, increasing harvesting yield.
Meta_Sickle_Printed.flavorText: MXC is a highly successful collective focused on licensing 3D printing blueprints.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha.description: A box of low-cost metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha.flavorText: With the advent of widespread, domestic metallic 3D printing, modern archery entered a golden age of specialist bickering about arow design and composition.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta.description: A box of low-cost metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta.flavorText: With the advent of widespread, domestic metallic 3D printing, modern archery entered a golden age of specialist bickering about arow design and composition.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie.description: A box of low-cost metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie.flavorText: With the advent of widespread, domestic metallic 3D printing, modern archery entered a golden age of specialist bickering about arow design and composition.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha_x5.description: A box of low-cost metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha_x5.flavorText: With the advent of widespread, domestic metallic 3D printing, modern archery entered a golden age of specialist bickering about arow design and composition.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta_x5.description: 3D printed arrows tipped with a fast-acting nerve agent that slows targets.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta_x5.flavorText: The non-lethal, but highly effective toxin skirts a number of international - and interplanetary - chemical weapons agreements.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie_x5.description: Metallic 3D printed arrows with a micro-barbed head designed for inflicting lethal wounds.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie_x5.flavorText: The legality of these projectiles is currently unclear.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.description: Five low-cost, metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.flavorText: If you hit, it\'s skill, if you miss, it\'s the rapidly crafted, low quality projectiles.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.description: Five arrows tipped with a rapid-action nerve agent that slows targets. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.flavorText: Additive manufacturing became the production process of choice following much needed advances in micro-recycling, which allowed almost any metallic compound to be processed, purified and reused as print material.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.description: Five swiftly printed metal polymer arrows with micro-barbed heads, designed to inflict more lethal wounds. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.flavorText: The legality of these projectiles is currently unclear.

Meta_Cot_Printed.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.

Meta_Campfire_Printed.description: A simple, prefabricated campfire for heat, light and cooking, designed to remain lit under all conditions.

Meta_Hammer_Printed.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Mission_Thruster.description: A quickly repaired basic thruster made from on materials found on planet.
Mission_Thruster.flavorText: How did this work to begin with?

Mission_Thruster_Salvaged.description: A salvaged basic thruster found in some debris.
Mission_Thruster_Salvaged.flavorText: How did this work to begin with?

Mission_Navigation.description: A Navigation Module for a Ship held together with materials found on planet.

Meta_Furnace_Printed.description: A premade furnace for all of your basic smelting needs
Meta_Furnace_Printed.flavorText: Basic but gets the job done

Meta_Crate_Printed.description: A premade crate to store your supplies

Meta_Mushroom_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Mushroom Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Mission_Gyro.flavorText: This is just what this ship needs to get back home.

Biofuel_Can_Meta.description: A makeshift fuel canister, that can hold biofuel, comes prefilled.
Biofuel_Can_Meta.flavorText: The caps a bit loose, still sealed, but that\'s fine right?

Mission_Prototype_Laser.description: The result of a makeshift repair.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Scanner.description: A device designed to monitor the effects of Abyssal Oxite on organic life.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Scanner.flavorText: The things we do for Ren.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.description: A control system for an environmental monitoring device.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.flavorText: Some circuitry, a little tape, good as new.

Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_1.description: An attachment that increases your melee damage.
Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Mixed_Berries.description: A tasty combination of berries to keep you going.
Mixed_Berries.flavorText: Another great meal from your Cooking Station.

Painting_Metal.description: A portrait painting on canvas with an iron frame.
Painting_Metal.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Iron_Wood_Axe.description: A toxin-coated Axe that allows you to delicately extract Infected Wood when chopping trees.
Iron_Wood_Axe.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Pickaxe.description: A toxin-coated Pickaxe that allows you to delicately extract Noxious Crust when mining.
Iron_Wood_Pickaxe.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Knife.description: A toxin-coated Knife that allows you to delicately extract Acidic Glands from animals when skinning.
Iron_Wood_Knife.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Spear.description: A toxin-coated Spear, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Spear.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Sickle.description: A toxin-coated Sickle, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife. Gives a chance to receive larger harvests.
Iron_Wood_Sickle.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Sledgehammer.description: A toxin-coated Hammer that allows you to delicately extract Noxious Crust when mining.
Iron_Wood_Sledgehammer.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Bolt.description: A toxin-coated Bolt, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Bolt.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Arrow.description: A toxin-coated Arrow, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Arrow.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Throwing_Knife.description: A toxin-coated Throwing Knife, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Iron_Wood_Throwing_Spear.description: A toxin-coated Throwing Spear, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.
Iron_Wood_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.

Meta_Module_Caving.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in protecting you from threats found in the cave systems of Icarus.
Meta_Module_Caving.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Mission_Prototype_Printed_Crate.description: A 3D Printed Crate with an internal battery for keeping contents preserved.

Moa_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Moa.
Moa_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Moa_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Smoked_Giant_Steak.description: A large steak, smoked and infused with a sweet watermelon flavor.

Rain_Reservoir_T3.description: Can collect rain water and be connected to a network to fill up other devices.
Rain_Reservoir_T3.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

Water_Trough_Metal.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.

Food_Trough_Metal.description: A Metal feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Metal.flavorText: Perfect for when you need to feed a lot of animals, fast.

Mushroom_Omlette.description: Fried egg with a generous helping of mushrooms.

Food_Animal_Feed_Mushroom.description: A feed that promotes rough terrain and rocky traversal.

Medicine_Bench.description: Used for creating tonics, pills and other medicines.

Advanced_Kitchen_Corner.description: Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.

Medicine_Bag.description: A sturdy satchel which can carry all sorts of medical supplies. Allows instant use of medicine inside the bag.
Medicine_Bag.flavorText: You are a real doctor now.

Kiwi_Nest.description: A hastily built kiwi nest for establishing a new colony on Icarus.
Kiwi_Nest.flavorText: Pretty good, even if it only took 5 minutes.

Mission_Monitoring_Pylon.description: A pylon designed for monitoring nearby wildlife.

Workshop_Cooker.description: A convenient cooking solution for a prospector on the go.

Workshop_Heater.description: A convenient heating solution for a prospector on the go.

Workshop_Hydrazine_Container.description: A canister to power your applicable MXC equipment.
Workshop_Hydrazine_Container.flavorText: A rare gas that once floated amongst the stars... now cooking your dinner.

Bunker_Medic_Cabinet.description: A wall mounted medical cabinet, perfect for storing medicine.

Milk_Bucket.description: A steel pail made for storing milk. Milk will spoil and the Pail will empty when this occurs.

LegendaryWeapon_GolemGauntlet.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Gauntlet created via studying of the Quarrite. Primarily used for mining.
LegendaryWeapon_GolemGauntlet.flavorText: The first step in Norex\'s efforts towards an Exoskeleton.

MakeshiftRadio.description: A makeshift radio for basic offworld communication.

Mission_MammothBioSample.description: A collection of biomatter from a Mammoth experiment.

Prop_Magazine.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.
Prop_Magazine.flavorText: Full of quizes and self help tips.

Prop_Microscope.description: A device that can be used to examine small samples.

Prop_Moisture_Analyzer.description: A machine used to determine the moisture levels in samples.

Mission_DNA_MixedBufferSolution.description: The result of mixing a sample with Tris-EDTA Buffer.

Prop_Medical_Trolly.description: Perfect for Storage of Medical Instruments.
Prop_Medical_Trolly.flavorText: Who builds a trolley with locked wheels?

Prop_Mining_Rail.description: A rail that was used to move mining carts.
Prop_Mining_Rail.flavorText: Looks like it\'s barely holding together.

Prop_Mining_Cart.description: An old mining cart which was used to transport ore.

Prop_Mining_Equipment.description: Strong equipment for use in large scale mining.

Fertility_Serum_Moa.description: Primes Male Moa\'s for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Moa\'s.
